WORK EXPERIENCE

GAP Factory, Sales Associate / Customer Service — Los Angeles, CA
October 2024 - Present

• Guide 40+ customers per shift by answering questions, and locating merchandise to support a positive shopping experience.
• Lead team members in handling high-volume traffic during peak hours, sustaining smooth store flow and cutting down wait times.
• Set shelves and promotional displays to merchandising standards, decreasing misplaced items by 25%.
• Promote sales by highlighting promotions and upselling complementary products, contributing to weekly revenue goals.

Dollar Tree, Cashier/Stock Associate — Los Angeles, CA
September 2023 - February 2024

• Reduced average wait times by 15% while upholding store service standards and customer satisfaction.
• Supervised daily service standards and resolved an average of customer needs per shift in a fast-paced retail environment, improved checkout flow and overall customer satisfaction.
• Addressed visual merchandising standards by setting up shelves and promotional displays, decreased misplaced items by 25%.

Student2Student Program, Peer Tutor & Student Mentor — Los Angeles, CA
September 2022 - July 2023

• Promoted a positive and supportive environment for student growth and development and engaged with two trustees.
• Enhanced daily math and reading instruction, reinforced lesson objective and fostered measurable growth in academic performance.
• Delivered one-on-one and small-group tutoring sessions for elementary and middle school students, tailoring lessons to diverse learning styles.

August 2019 - February 2023

• Supported and motivated 20+ teammates during practices and games, contributing to a stronger sense of collaboration and team spirit.
• Gained leadership and communication skills by serving as an informal peer leader, helping teammates improve performance during drills and matches.
• Contributed to overall team success, helping secure multiple league wins and consistent playoff appearances.

August 2019 - February 2023

• Engaged in weekly wellness and leadership workshops across four years, covering goal setting, health, self-development, and decision-making.
• Facilitated small-group discussions and fitness activities for 10–15 peers, creating a safe and supportive environment for personal growth.
• Developed resilience and self-awareness by completing multiple community service and reflection projects, building confidence and leadership potential.
